# inflatablemodel — Custom Inflatable Manufacturing
> B2B manufacturer of giant product replicas, inflatable mascots, arches, costumes, tents, and games. 3-6 week turnaround, free 3D renderings.

## Main Pages
- Home: https://inflatablemodel.com.cn — Company overview and product categories
- Products: https://inflatablemodel.com.cn/products — Full product catalog
- Gallery: https://inflatablemodel.com.cn/gallery — Case studies and past projects
- How It Works: https://inflatablemodel.com.cn/how-it-works — Design to production process
- About: https://inflatablemodel.com.cn/about — Company story and team
- Contact: https://inflatablemodel.com.cn/contact — Get in touch
- FAQ: https://inflatablemodel.com.cn/faq — Common questions
- Blog: https://inflatablemodel.com.cn/blog — Industry insights

## Products
- Giant Product Replicas: /products/giant-product-replicas — Turn products into skyscraper-sized attractions
- Inflatable Mascots: /products/inflatable-mascots — Custom character mascots
- Inflatable Arches: /products/inflatable-arches — Branded arches and finish lines
- Inflatable Costumes: /products/inflatable-costumes — Wearable inflatable suits
- Inflatable Tents: /products/inflatable-tents — Custom canopies and shelters
- Inflatable Games: /products/inflatable-games — Obstacle courses and interactive games
